nasb.text: When the Arameans of Damascus came to help Hadadezer king of Zobah, David killed 22,000 men of the Arameans.

esv.text: And when the Syrians of Damascus came to help Hadadezer king of Zobah, David struck down 22,000 men of the Syrians.

cnv.text: 大馬士革的亞蘭人來幫助瑣巴王哈大底謝的時候，大衛就殺了二萬二千名亞蘭人。

ccb.text: 大马士革的亚兰人前来支援琐巴王哈大底谢，大卫杀了他们两万二千人，
